---
title: "Valeria Fierros"
toc: false
image: removed.png
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 13em
  links: 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/valeriafierros/valeriafierros.github.io
    - icon: at
      text: Email
      href: valeriafierros@ucsb.edu
---

### Welcome!

I am a fourth-year Environmental Studies B.S. student at UC Santa Barbara. I am an intern at the Cheadle Center for Biodiversity & Ecological Restoration working on a PhD student's plant research. I am also interested in wildlife research and hope to pursue that in my post-grad career. Here you can find links to some of my other stuff (LinkedIn, Github, email) and more to learn about me!
